channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats blame and rush to replace former candidate Graham Platner after scandal
item.description: Following a rape accusation, Graham Platner withdrew from the Maine Senate race, prompting Democrats to urgently seek a new candidate.

item.title: Democrats only dropped Platner due to poor election prospects, not his past statements
item.description: The party continues to support radical and anti-American politicians, despite Platner's departure.

item.title: AIPAC spends $1.2 million to prevent Cori Bush's return to Congress
item.description: The pro-Israel lobby is prioritizing blocking former Representative Cori Bush, a democratic socialist, from regaining her seat.

item.title: Iran falls out of favor with Trump again
item.description: The previously described 'very rational people' may have restarted conflict with the U.S.
